ナビゲーション・リンクをスキップ
  • 概要
  • 階層ツリー
  • 非推奨
  • 索引
  • 検索
  • ヘルプ

    すべてのクラスおよびインタフェース

    クラス
    説明
    ActionGateway
    Owns cooldown gating and dispatch for typed character actions.
    ActionListener
    Observer interface for monitoring discrete attack actions within the combat simulation.
    ActionResult
    Result of one environment step.
    ActionSpace
    Discrete action space and validity masking for RL.
    ActionTimelineExecutor
    Owns post-resolution action sequencing such as follow-up buffs, action event dispatch, animation-duration scaling, and timeline advancement.
    ActionTriggeredWeaponEffect
    Capability for weapons with passives that trigger when the owner performs an action.
    ActionType
    Classifies the type of action performed by a character during the simulation.
    ActiveCharacterBuff
    A Buff that only applies its stat bonuses when a specific character is the currently active (on-field) character.
    AlleyFlash
     
    AmenomaKageuchi
     
    ArtifactOptimizer
    Generates a simulated artifact stat block following the KQM Standard (KQMS) substat methodology.
    ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig
    Configuration passed to ArtifactOptimizer.generate(ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig, StatsContainer, StatsContainer, StatsContainer) to control which main stats and substat allocation strategy to use.
    ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationResult
    Container for the artifact stats and the liquid roll allocation produced by ArtifactOptimizer.generate(ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig, StatsContainer, StatsContainer, StatsContainer).
    ArtifactRollProfile
    Holds optimizer-produced artifact roll allocations for a character.
    ArtifactSet
    Represents an artifact set (e.g.
    AttackAction
    Describes a single discrete damage-dealing action performed by a character.
    AttackAction.LunarReactionType
     
    AubadeOfMorningstarAndMoon
     
    AubadeOfMorningstarAndMoon.AubadeBuff
     
    BatchProtocol
    Binary protocol constants shared by the Java rollout service and the Python learner.
    BattleEnvironment
    Teacher-free RL environment backed by CombatSimulator.
    BattleEnvironment.ResetResult
    Reset return values.
    BattleEnvironment.TimingSnapshot
     
    BenchmarkRLJava
    Local benchmark for vectorized Java environment stepping.
    Bennett
     
    Buff
    Abstract base class for all stat-modifying buffs in the simulation.
    BuffId
    Typed identifiers for buffs whose presence is queried by simulator logic.
    BuffManager
    Owns simulator-managed team buffs, field buffs, and buff collection rules.
    BurstStateProvider
    Capability for characters that expose a meaningful burst-active window.
    BurstTriggeredArtifactEffect
     
    CalamityQueller
    Calamity Queller (5-star Polearm).
    CapabilityProfiler
    Derives capability scores for each character in a party by running controlled simulation experiments.
    CapabilityProfiler.TemplateRun
     
    Character
    Abstract base class for all playable characters in the simulation.
    CharacterActionKey
    Typed top-level character action categories used by simulator dispatch.
    CharacterActionRequest
    Typed request for a non-hit character action.
    CharacterId
     
    CharacterTeamBuffProvider
    Capability for characters that contribute team-wide buffs outside their own stats.
    Columbina
    Custom "Lunar" Hydro character implementation.
    CombatActionResolver
    Resolves an AttackAction into damage, aura changes, reactions, and related combat side effects without advancing simulation time.
    CombatActionResolver.ActionResolutionContext
     
    CombatLogSink
    Abstraction for writing timeline-style combat logs during a simulation run.
    CombatSimulator
    Coordinates the time-based combat simulation and delegates focused runtime work to helper collaborators.
    CombatSimulator.Moonsign
    Represents the global Moonsign state of the party.
    CombatSimulator.ReactionListener
    Observer interface for elemental reaction events.
    CooldownState
    Holds skill and burst cooldown state, including charge restoration.
    DamageCalculator
    Computes outgoing damage for a single attack action.
    DamageReport
    Tracks cumulative damage dealt during a simulation run and formats summary output.
    DamageStrategy
    Strategy for resolving final damage for a single AttackAction.
    DamageTracker
    Abstraction for recording cumulative simulation damage and producing DPS summaries.
    DamageTriggeredArtifactEffect
     
    DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
    Capability for weapons with passives that trigger when the owner deals damage.
    Deathmatch
     
    DragonsBane
     
    Element
    Enumeration of the seven playable elements plus Physical damage in Genshin Impact.
    ElementColorPalette
    Chooses chart colors for report actors.
    EmblemOfSeveredFate
     
    Enemy
    Represents an enemy target in the combat simulation.
    EnergyAnalyzer
    Post-simulation utility that calculates the minimum Energy Recharge (ER) required for each party member to cast their burst every rotation.
    EnergyDistributor
    Instance-based orchestrator for particle and flat-energy distribution within a single CombatSimulator.
    EnergyManager
    Handles particle/orb energy distribution and scheduled enemy particle drops for the combat simulation.
    EnergyState
    Holds runtime energy totals and burst-window accounting for a character.
    EpisodeConfig
    Runtime configuration for one RL episode.
    FavoniusCodex
     
    Flins
    Custom "Lunar" Electro polearm character implementation.
    FlinsParty
     
    FlinsParty2
     
    FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory
    Creates the fixed FlinsParty2 simulator used by Java-native RL.
    FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory.CachedBuild
     
    HtmlReportGenerator
    Public entry point for generating interactive HTML simulation reports.
    ICDManager
    Tracks Internal Cooldown (ICD) state per character per skill group to determine whether an elemental hit actually applies an element to the enemy.
    ICDManager.ICDState
    Mutable ICD tracking state for one (character, tag) group.
    ICDTag
    Labels the ICD group that an elemental application belongs to.
    ICDType
    Defines the Internal Cooldown (ICD) behaviour for an elemental application.
    Ineffa
    Custom "Lunar" Electro character implementation.
    IterativeSimulator
    Provides two independent iterative optimization loops: IterativeSimulator.optimizeER(Function, Consumer, int) – converges on the minimum Energy Recharge needed for each character to burst on rotation.
    KQMSConstants
    KQM Standards (KQMS) constants used as the baseline assumptions for all benchmark simulations and artifact optimizations.
    LunarDamageStrategy
    Custom Lunar damage path used by Lunar-considered attacks.
    MoonsignManager
    Owns Moonsign-related party-state updates and derived Lunar buff application.
    MoonsignManager.MoonsignBuff
    Buff implementation for Moonsign: Ascendant Blessing.
    MultiPartyRLSimulatorFactory
    Samples uniformly from multiple party simulators for RL training.
    NightOfTheSkysUnveiling
     
    NoblesseOblige
     
    NocturnesCurtainCall
    Nocturne's Curtain Call (5-star Catalyst).
    ObservationEncoder
    Encodes simulator state into a fixed-size observation vector.
    ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore
    Loads and caches character capability profiles from a JSON file.
    OptimizerPipeline
    Orchestrates the two-phase artifact optimization pipeline.
    ParticleListener
    Observer interface for monitoring elemental particle generation events.
    ParticleType
    Represents the two sizes of elemental energy pickup in Genshin Impact.
    Party
    Represents the active four-character party in a simulation run.
    PeriodicDamageEvent
    A TimerEvent that fires a repeating AttackAction at a fixed interval for a defined duration, optionally running an additional callback on each tick.
    PolicyInference
    Policy outputs for one environment slot.
    PrimordialJadeWingedSpear
    Primordial Jade Winged-Spear (5-star Polearm).
    ProfileAction
    Typed action commands used by optimizer profiles and scripted combat routines.
    ProfileCharacterCapabilities
    Entry point for generating capability profiles for one or more registered RL parties.
    ProfileFileAdapter
    Boundary adapter for the plain-text profile file format.
    ProfileLoader
    Parses named action profiles from a plain-text profile source.
    ProfileLoader.ActionProfile
    A named sequence of action commands for one character.
    ProspectorShovel
    Prospector's Shovel (custom weapon).
    QuietExecution
    Small helper to mute stdout during high-throughput rollout execution.
    RaidenParty
     
    RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory
    Creates the fixed Raiden/Xingqiu/Xiangling/Bennett simulator used by multi-party RL.
    RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory.CachedBuild
     
    RaidenShogun
     
    ReactionAwareArtifact
     
    ReactionAwareCharacter
    Marker interface for characters with reaction-listener behavior.
    ReactionCalculator
    Computes elemental reactions triggered when a new element interacts with an existing elemental aura on an enemy.
    ReactionEffectScheduler
    Owns reaction follow-up scheduling policies such as Electro-Charged ticks.
    ReactionResult
     
    ReactionResult.Kind
     
    ReactionResult.LunarType
     
    ReactionResult.Type
     
    ReactionState
    Holds transient simulation state for Electro-Charged and Thundercloud handling.
    ReactionStateController
    Owns simulator-facing access to transient reaction state such as Electro-Charged scheduling flags and Thundercloud expiry.
    RecurrentState
    Mutable recurrent hidden state.
    ReportData
    Report-ready data assembled before HTML rendering.
    ReportData.ReportArtifactRollView
     
    ReportDataBuilder
    Converts simulation records and runtime state into report-ready aggregates.
    ReportFileWriter
    Writes rendered reports to the output directory.
    ReportHtmlRenderer
    Renders report-ready data into a self-contained Chart.js HTML document.
    ReportViewAdapter
    Adapts typed simulation/analysis data into report-facing labels and DOM keys.
    ReportViewAdapter.ReportCharacterStats
     
    ReportViewAdapter.ReportCharacterView
     
    ReportViewAdapter.ReportStatsSnapshot
     
    ResistanceCalculator
    Centralizes enemy resistance and resistance-shred math for outgoing damage.
    ResonanceManager
    Detects the party's elemental composition and applies the appropriate elemental resonance team buff to the simulator.
    RewardFunction
    Computes the reward for one transition.
    RLAction
    Fixed Java-native RL action space.
    RLEpisodeFactory
    Creates simulator episodes together with the party-specific metadata required by RL.
    RLEpisodeFactory.EpisodeContext
    One fully specified episode instance.
    RLPartyRegistry
    Central registry for RL-available party variants.
    RLPartySpec
    Declarative description of one RL-usable party variant.
    RolloutService
    Local-only binary rollout service used by the Python learner.
    RotationSearcher
    Finds the highest-damage rotation by exhaustively evaluating all combinations of character order permutations and named action profiles.
    RotationSearcher.RotationPlan
    The result of a single rotation evaluation: the character cast order, the action profile chosen for each character, and the total damage dealt.
    RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation
    Encapsulates a single (order, profiles) combination to be evaluated in the parallel stream.
    RunnerStepResult
    Batched environment step response returned by the rollout service.
    SacrificialSword
     
    ServeRLJava
    Starts the local Java rollout service used by the Python learner.
    SilkenMoonsSerenade
     
    SimpleBuff
    A concrete Buff implementation that delegates stat application to a Consumer<StatsContainer> lambda.
    SimpleTimerEvent
    Convenience base class for recurring TimerEvent implementations with a fixed interval.
    SimulationClock
    Owns simulation time progression and timer-event execution.
    SimulationEventBus
    Abstraction for simulation event subscription and dispatch.
    SimulationEventDispatcher
    Owns listener registration and notification for simulation-side events.
    SimulationRecord
     
    SinglePartyRLEpisodeFactory
    Adapts one fixed simulator supplier into an RLEpisodeFactory.
    SkywardBlade
     
    SkywardSpine
     
    SnapshotState
    Holds the latest captured stat snapshot for delayed damage resolution.
    StandardDamageStrategy
    Standard Genshin damage path used by non-Lunar attacks.
    StatAssembler
    Assembles character stat views from base stats, equipment, passives, and buffs.
    StatsContainer
    A container that holds numeric values for each StatType.
    StatsRecorder
    Periodically records effective character stats and active buff names during a simulation run, producing a series of StatsSnapshot objects.
    StatsSnapshot
    Immutable data record holding a complete snapshot of all party member stats and active buff names at a specific point in simulation time.
    StatType
    Enumeration of every stat key used throughout the simulation.
    Sucrose
    Anemo Catalyst support character (Sucrose) implementation.
    SunnyMorningSleepIn
    Sunny Morning Sleep-In (5-star Catalyst).
    SwitchAwareArtifact
     
    SwitchAwareCharacter
    Capability for characters with explicit switch-out behavior.
    SwitchAwareWeaponEffect
    Capability for weapons with passives that react when the owner leaves the field.
    SwitchManager
    Owns character switching policy, callbacks, and timeline logging.
    TalentDataManager
     
    TalentDataSource
    Read-only source of character talent and base-stat values.
    TheCatch
     
    TimerEvent
    Contract for all time-driven events managed by the CombatSimulator event queue.
    TotalOptimizationResult
    Holds the complete results of the OptimizerPipeline after both Phase 1 (ER calibration) and Phase 2 (DPS hill-climbing) have finished.
    VectorizedEnvironment
    Manages many independent battle environments behind one runner id.
    VectorizedEnvironment.IndexConsumer
     
    VectorizedEnvironment.MetricsSnapshot
     
    VectorizedEnvironment.ParallelTiming
     
    VectorizedEnvironment.RunnerResetResult
    Reset response.
    ViridescentVenerer
     
    VisualLogger
     
    VisualLoggerSink
    Default CombatLogSink implementation backed by VisualLogger.
    WanderingEvenstar
     
    Weapon
    Represents a weapon that can be equipped on a Character.
    WeaponTeamBuffProvider
    Capability for weapons that contribute team-wide buffs.
    WeaponType
    Weapon category used to determine the expected flat energy generated per Normal or Charged Attack hit (the "NA energy" mechanic).
    WolfFang
     
    Xiangling
     
    Xingqiu
